title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 197.410 - Application for license, fee
text:
197.410.  Application for license, fee. — 1.  Persons desiring to receive a license to operate a home health agency in the state of Missouri shall file a written application with the department of health and senior services on a form prescribed by the director of the department.
  2.  The application shall be accompanied by a six hundred-dollar license fee.
(L. 1983 H.B. 51 § 3)
